title: It's Too Late
why_this_song: It's Too Late by Carole King (1971) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: And I just can't fake it
Oh, no, no, no (no, no, no)
It used to be so easy livin' here with you
You were light and breezy, and I knew just what to do
And I just can't fake it

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "late" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "late" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "it's" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "it's" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Though we really did try to make it
And I just can't fake it

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "It's Too Late" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "It's Too Late" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "It's Too Late", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "It's Too Late", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "It's Too Late" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "It's Too Late" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
